task.en: In Reminders, create a single reminder in the default list (the first list shown in the sidebar) titled exactly `Submit Q3 expense report`, due Monday, July 13, 2026 at 9:00 AM. Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null; done; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; done; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; TOT=0; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); TOT=$((TOT + ${N:-0})); done; [ "$TOT" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; HIT=False; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; D=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT date(ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-07-13" ] && HIT=True; done; echo "$HIT"

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; HIT=False; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; T=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Submit Q3 expense report' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "09:00" ] && HIT=True; done; echo "$HIT"
